title.en: After a period of time, Ye Tian's realm was com...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestral Body began to transform into the Extreme Dao Void Body, as if it had completely evolved, and its physical body was more than ten times stronger.

Moreover, the Extreme Dao Ancestral Power has also completed its transformation, and both the quality and the total amount have skyrocketed a lot.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger, far more terrifying than in the past.

This breakthrough, Ye Tian took out a lot of resources, otherwise he would still not be able to replenish his energy in time just by relying on the energy absorption of the Wudao Tower, so he had to add some extreme resources to allow himself to perfectly and quickly break through to the realm of the perfect controller of the virtual realm.

After a period of time, Ye Tian's realm was completely stabilized.

"I have finally broken through to the realm of the perfect controller of the virtual realm, and I have stepped into the level of the perfect controller of the three realms, although it is not as good as the perfect controller of the extreme realm, but with my current strength, I should be almost invincible at the level of the perfect controller of the virtual realm, and I can even match the weaker perfect controller of the true realm, right?"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he hadn't fought against the True Realm Perfect Master, so he wasn't sure what level of strength he had reached.

Soon, Ye Tian was out of the customs.

As soon as he came out of the customs, one of the tower masters of the Wudao Tower came to congratulate Ye Tian.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord for breaking through to the Perfect Master of the Shroud!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord for breaking through to the Perfect Master of the Shroud!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord for breaking through to the Perfect Master of the Shroud!"

Soon, the news of Ye Tian's breakthrough to the Void Realm Perfect Controller spread throughout the Daoless Pagoda, and countless cultivators knew about it.

Although it was a matter of time before Ye Tian broke through to become the perfect controller of the Void Realm, it was still beyond their expectations to break through so quickly.

"The Lord of Endless was far inferior to me at the beginning, and in my eyes he was a little guy, but I didn't expect that now he has stepped into the realm of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm one step ahead of me!"

The Lord of Time sighed.

Of course, he won't compare with Ye Tian, this guy is a pervert, he killed so many extreme creatures by himself, it's terrifying!

Compared with Ye Tian, it was completely a blow.

No road tower, a certain branch tower.

The Yueli controller also knew the news of Ye Tian's breakthrough, and he was immediately shocked.

"My teacher's strength breakthrough is too fast, at the beginning, he was at the same level as me, he was a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and now he has become a perfect controller of the Void Realm, and his reputation is resounding throughout the world, and I have just broken through to the perfect controller. "

The Moonglass Controller muttered.

However, she has also made great progress, under the guidance of Ye Tian, she finally comprehended the Extreme Dao of Water when she was creating a half-step perfect controller realm realm, and she is expected to become a perfect controller of the extreme realm in the future.

......

Somewhere at the end of the world.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord also knew about Ye Tian's breakthrough, and was immediately shocked.

"This guy broke through too fast!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord exclaimed.

Before, Ye Tian could easily kill him in seconds when he was in the realm of a perfect controller, and now he can blow him to death in one go.

"You must not offend the Lord of the Endless!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said secretly.

Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

A group of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were also discussing, and they also knew the news of Ye Tian's breakthrough from special channels.

"The Endless Lord, who killed a large number of our Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm before, has just broken through to become the perfect controller of the Void Realm, and with his strength, I am afraid that he is not weaker than the average Perfect Controller of the True Realm, and it is very difficult to kill him. "

"If the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller makes a move and finds his body, he can be killed in an instant. However, once you do it, I'm afraid you won't be able to escape, and I guess none of you want to do it. "

"We have all reached the realm of the Extreme Perfect Controller, naturally we don't want to fall, after all, the end of the realm is not the Extreme Deep Sea, once we kill the Lord of Endless there, if we are entangled, we will attract strong people such as the Lord of the White Night, I am afraid that we will not be able to escape. However, if you are a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm who is good at escaping, if you are careful, coupled with the Extreme Treasure that travels through time and space, you should be almost sure that you will escape in time. "

"Or is it a bit risky, what if it fails?"

"Could it really be that the Endless Lord rising? The other party's combat power, you don't know if you have never seen it, is truly invincible at the same level. Once you really let the other party grow to the realm of the Extreme Perfect Controller, if there is a war in the future, you may fall into his hands. "

These Extreme Realm Perfect Masters kept discussing, but no one dared to go.

Abrupt.

An Extreme Dao creature spoke: "I can go and kill the Endless Lord, but I need the Extreme Path Treasure in the hands of the Lord of Dark Shadows, the Sword of Shadow, and the Light Shuttle in the hands of the Lord of Light Worms, with these two Extreme Dao Treasures, I dare to sneak into the Infinite Towers at the end of the realm and kill the Endless Lord's body!"

The Extreme Dao creature who spoke was an extremely powerful Extreme Realm Perfect Controller of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, the Lord of the Dragon and Snake, whose strength was much stronger than that of the ordinary Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, and he was good at the Space Pole and the Speed Pole, among which the Speed Pole was extremely close to the Extreme Level, and he had mastered a trace of the Extreme Speed Pole.

"I can lend you the Sword of Shadow!"

The Lord of Dark Shadows did not hesitate and said directly.

Although the Shadow Sword is a very good Extreme Treasure and has the ability to penetrate regardless of time and space, for the weak, the Shadow Sword can ignore the opponent's Extreme Treasure protection and other defense methods, directly penetrate everything, and bombard the opponent.

But for the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, the enhanced combat power of the Shadow Sword is average, so the Lord of Dark Shadow doesn't care very much.

However, the Lord of Light Worms hesitated.

Because he very much needs the light shuttle, which is extremely compatible with himself, once he loses the light shuttle, his strength will decline a lot.

In case the Lord of the Dragon and Snake fails and loses the light shuttle, who does he ask for?

"Lord of Light Worms, lend the Light Shuttle to the Lord of Dragons and Snakes for the time being!"

A Pole creature spoke.

He is one of the generals of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, the Lord of the Holy Spirit, who is weaker than the Lord of the Dragon Snake, but his status is higher than that of the Lord of the Dragon and Snake.

The status of the Extreme Dao Creatures of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace is from high to low, respectively, the palace master, the general master and the ordinary members, of which there are eighteen palace masters and thirty-three general masters.

Every general is an incomparably ancient existence, and has made great contributions to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, and can even be said to be one of the founders of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Therefore, when the Lord of the Holy Spirit speaks, the Lord of the Light Worms naturally wants to give face.

"Since the Lord of the Holy Spirit has spoken, I will lend the Light Shuttle to the Lord of the Dragon and Snake!" said the Lord of Light Worms helplessly.

"With the Sword of Shadows and the Light Shuttle, I will kill the Lord of Infinity, but I hope you will answer me. Moreover, this attack will expose a secret passage, which is an unavoidable situation. "The Lord of the Dragon and Snake.

"Okay, we will answer you, even if the Lord of the White Night dares to chase and kill to the passage, we are not afraid, he does not dare to kill into the deep sea of the Extreme Path, otherwise he will be looking for death!"

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Dragon and Snake went to refine the Shadow Sword and the Light Shuttle, the two extreme treasures, and once the refining was completed, he would sneak into the end of the realm and attack Ye Tian.
